reviews.review_text: Great location, very clean Cabin and dog friendly

Great location and lovely facilities. Better to be camped near the "cliff" for best views and star gazing. Toilets, showers, laundry facilities, kitchen and BBQ area. For the kids there's a small playground. Easy beach access. Wheelchair friendly facilities also. Lots of drinking water fountains and toilets provided

Arrived late and left info pack at the reception area for us.

Lovely spot and would stay again but costs can add up.

A really gorgeous little caravan park that also has a number of cabins. Easy access to beautiful beaches and stunning coastal walks. The staff are very friendly and (excuse the pun) accommodating, particularly when we requested another site with better views. |The amenities are old but very clean and great water pressure and hot water. |About 3km from the Apollo Bay shops but worth it.

Die Stellplätze sind gut und auch gerade aber die duschen und Toiletten sind sehr alt, dunkel und eher schmuddelig. Wir haben hier nur zwei Nächte verbracht, mehr würde ich auf keinen Fall machen. Lage ist sehr schön direkt am Meer mit Blick auf die Seehunde (Fernglas mitnehmen!)

Ein wirklich super schön gelegener Campingplatz direkt an der Küste mit Blick auf die Bucht. Die Stellplätze sind schön angeordnet, sodass man immer nur einen Nachbarn hat. An der anderen Seite ist eine hohe Hecke. Strom und Wasser sind direkt am Platz. Der Platz ist schön gerade. Die Rezeption war entgegen von anderen Bewertungen sehr freundlich. Wir hatten bereits am Morgen online vorreserviert und wurden per Mail auf alles vorbereitet, mit dem Hinweis, sich dennoch kurz an der Rezeption zu melden, was wir auch getan haben. Wir haben noch ein paar nützliche Informationen bekommen. Wenn man später kommen sollte, ist das kein Problem, man kann die Unterlagen aus dem Briefkasten entnehmen. Man kann direkt vom Campingplatz zum Strand, wo viele Menschen auch gesurft haben.

Das Sanitärgebäude ist zwar schon älter, aber sauber und alles funktioniert wunderbar. Das Einzige, was wir bemerkten, ist, dass es nur drei Duschkabinen für den gesamten Park gibt. Hier gab es am Abend zu Stoßzeiten (20 Uhr) Engpässe.
Gutted that we only had time to stay one night.  What a stunning location and with all the lovely shops and restaurants so close in Apollo Bay.  Just beautiful.

We are a young family with a 3 month old baby, we found ourselves needing emergency accommodation on Australia Day long weekend due to being evacuated from the Otway National Park due to bushfires. We landed in Apollo Bay as we were booked in there on the 26th of January. We understand this is a busy time and not ideal to be looking for a last minute caravan site. We called the park and were immediately told they were booked out. We decided to try online and we were able to book not one but two sites, one for our family and one for the in-laws. Whilst the park was very busy they were NOT fully booked as we were told on the phone. It seemed as though the staff did not have the time of day for us. Upon checking in we were told our information was in the lockbox despite the office being opened, the lady working appeared to be in a rush to get to lunch this was at 12pm and I understand the office closes for lunch at 12:30. The park is in a great location but it was overpriced for the amenities available.  I am not usually one to leave a review, however I was very disappointed with the service received given the situation we found ourselves in.
Beautiful location. Walking distance to a crystal clear and clean beach.
Great place to stay and the view is to die for
Excelente lugar para acampar, servicios de cocina, baños y ducha y lavandería de excelente calidad. La vista es espectacular y se pueden apreciar focas y pingüinos.

We arrived late on Xmas eve , but reception had left details for us.  We were right near the beach.   But was awful weather to enjoy it.  |Toilets  were clean and  laundry area. Was so easy to use with area to high up our clothes

Good location to stop when doing the great Ocean road. Reception was great, very accommodating and friendly! We camped on a powered site with room for two vehicles with roof tops. Amenities were clean and in good condition.

Amazing location, right on the beach and clean amenities. We only stayed 1 night, on a Sunday, out of school holidays, so not too busy.
3 showers & 3 toilets in the ladies, but lots of hot water and great water pressure.
The camp kitchen was fully enclosed, light & bright and clean.
Staff at check-in was very friendly with lots of advice on the great ocean walk which runs through the camp.
$67 for a powered site, beginning of Dec 2025.
+ Free wifi

Glorious location, great amenities, helpful, supportive staff…lovely neighbours. We had a beautiful stay! Being able to take my dog there was fantastic! We went on quiet beach walks and wandered all over! It’s a beautiful area…
Lovely caravan park with well equipped cabins.
Stayed on site in our caravan. Amazing views. Beautiful clean amenities and very knowledgeable and helpful staff. Did not want to leave.

Lovely caravan park. Perfect ocean-front location. Cabin was clean and spacious with everything we needed. Staff were helpful. Toddler loved the play equipment. Only downside was the dryer, which didn't seem to work very well. Usually not a necessity but we really did need it this time as we were doing an emergency evening clothes wash thanks to an adventurous toddler!||Overall loved out stay.

Hands down our favourite stay on the Great Ocean Road. The atmosphere was incredible — hearing the waves at night, watching the sunrise, and spotting the seals from the rocks nearby was pure magic. Beautiful quiet location, clean amenities, and really friendly staff. Could’ve stayed here forever! 🌊🐚
Nice dog-friendly place that's close to a dog-friendly beach.  Free Wi-Fi etc.  Our cabin had 2 bedrooms, queen and two double bunk beds in the second room.
It was a muddy pit
Great service and lovely spot. Bathrooms only had 3 showers and 3 toilets. We didn't have trouble but others using in peak times or with children said had to wait ages. Be much worse in summer.
非常不錯的一個露營區，非常近海邊可以看落日
Amazing!!! Super close to the ocean, the cabin extremely clean! When we got there it was quite chill outside and the cabin was already warm inside :) we will definitely come back here. Thank you ❤️

What a gem. Small park that doesn't try to be a huge theme park. Great sites all a good size. All close to the ocean. Amenities are some of the cleanest I've seen. Close to Apollo Bay shops|Would definitely recommend this Park and will be staying again.

Couldn't have asked for a better location literally right on the beach. The lady in the front office was so lovely. We have a big rig and she put us on a double site so we could fit. Also, I have to mention the showers. When you're travelling a decent shower is always appreciated. The showers have perfect temperature and pressure. So good!

Came for a last minute one night stay in the middle of winter. We just stayed in an unpowered site. Wow, the views were just amazing at sunset and early morning. Beautiful to hear the waves crashing as we fell asleep. Would definitely recommend to anyone and hoping we will be back!
Fabulous location with best service

One of the best cabin experiences just right in the Marengo beach! The cabin was spotless and sparkling clean. They had all ammenities in the cabin - crockery, cutleries, Microwave, oven, towels etc.
The cabin can easily fit around 5 people.
Worth visiting and its a must stay as its in a prime location!

A great van park for winter, not many there and winter deals are good..
Only down side is I think caravan parks should not allow firepits as van spacing is to close ( if you have respiratory problems ) or you just don't like the smell.of smoke around your van from someone else ( or 2 vans lit up with pits )
Would visit again.

From arrival to when we left we loved it beautiful park well maintained the cabin was beautiful and clean couldn’t of asked for more|The grounds were lovely and well kept staff very welcoming.  Loved listening to the sea at night close to the shopping centre.
What a great little park! No frills but well kept amenities, camp kitchen and kids playground. Ultimate beach views and so close to apollo bay. Our family was really happy with our stay here.

The friendly hosts Louise and Karin were accommodating and went far beyond expected. Cabin was clean, spacious, well appointed with a great view of the beach and hills. Laundry /public toilets clean and everything working.  Very quiet, 5 mins drive to shops, cafes, IGA at Apollo Bay. Highly recommended.

The friendly hosts Louise and Karin were accommodating and went far beyond expected. Cabin was clean, spacious, well appointed with a great view of the beach and hills. Laundry /public toilets clean and everything working.  Very quiet, 5 mins drive to shops, cafes, IGA at Apollo Bay. Highly recommended.
Very nice to stay especially when the weather is good, and the beach beautiful

Really nice for the low season, $100 for 3 nights for a powered site.

The +: • The view was unbelievable from our site (69) 😍
• The ocean was at our doorstep 🌊
• The area is very pretty, with beautiful walking tracks 🚶🏼‍♀️

The -: • The amenities were on the opposite side of the campground 🚿
• The campsites were flat and very close together.
• There was a smell of dog poop around our site 🐕

Conclusion: It was really nice and good for the price ($33/night), but we wouldn't spend more. This place needs a bit of love and it will become a little paradise ✨️

Peaceful and scenic with the sound of waves all night. Clean facilities, great communal spaces, and incredibly kind staff—especially when we got our car stuck! Highly recommend and would definitely return

Stayed at this park as it's only one of two that allow dogs. We had a powered van site which we had to pay for up front.
Showers and toilets are disgusting, old and not cleaned near enough as frequent as they should.
They are old and dindgy. We ended using our own shower as these are worse than you would get in prison.
No TV reception either.
The location is great but Apollo bay in general didn't have any clean toilet facilities to handle tourists. With COVID still a threat I would have thought the council would at least clean public toilets.
I would not recommend staying at this caravan park and we will never stay here again.
Apollo bay in general was a let down, too busy and very expensive.
P.S. make sure to take plenty of money if eating out as the prices are very expensive.
Nice for 4 person room

Great location. But the site is small and tight to manoeuvre. Amenities are old and dank. Prices were very expensive considering the state of the park. My advice is find somewhere else, we won't be coming back again.

Small but quite spot. amenities need updating but shower had great pressure. office not always attended. Exit a bit steep as by all the scrap
marks. Seen a couple of sea creatures in the rock pools. A short drive to maits rest at night to see glow worms only had android phone so very had to see. Wifi Little to none constantly cuts out
Amazing view and great location but $53 for an unpowered site (grass patch on a hill) I think is a bit rough, but hey I guess thats what it is now.

Lovely place to stay, Great Amenities, Clean Toliets & Great Bathrooms.
Everyone is polite and friendly- receptionist office was very helpful. 10/10 would recommend.
(staying in a powered site in a van)
Great spot, awesome staff.
Dog friendly, office staff very helpful and kind, highly recommend

It's a prefectly located park with clean bathrooms, hot water, and a well equipped and maintained common kitchen.
The only downside was that the park team was not very specific in the pre-arrival communications.

Not worth pulling into when you can go 5 minutes up the road to Apollo Bay.We stayed 1 night powered site $73, I commented on the price and the reply was we’re the cheapest it gets dearer heading towards Torquay.
To my astonishment I looked up the prices of caravan parks on the way from Marengo to Torquay and the average price being $50.
The Marengo Park is so old and run down, I would not recommend this to anyone.
Staying in a caravan site. It's tight for the caravan and car, but it's a great location and cheaper than just down the road in Apollo Bay. Can hear the waves crashing.
Beautiful beach, better than Apollo bay

Picking a caravan park is a gamble—like throwing down on the Melbourne Cup. You study the form, pick the favorite, only to watch it get blindsided by some scrappy long shot. But every now and then, you nail it.

Today, we nailed it.

This place sits on a small headland, nearly surrounded by the kind of crashing waves that make you forget about whatever nonsense the world is serving up. A true gem. The facilities? Clean. The vibe? Pure coastal chill. And the best part—it’s right on the Great Ocean Road Walk. We knocked out a 70-minute stretch, the kind of walk that reminds you why you do this in the first place. Cliffs, ocean, endless horizon. Just breathtaking.

Apollo Bay is five minutes down the road, packed with solid cafes and eateries. The kind of place where a good meal and a cold drink cap off a perfect day. No regrets here.
This was another great cabin  great  views quiet people were very friendly laundry room was very clean also  dog  friendly  cabin had a gate on it

There is only one shower block in this facility and I suspect like a lot of coastal caravan parks have done they have turned two sites into three which makes everything tight and uncomfortable . If you are going to do this you have to have some regard for the punters that are making your profits for you and make sure there is basic things available like hot water. I just finished a cold shower and i think you could easily avoid this. Won’t be coming back.
Lack of hot water in showers

Wir wurden freundlich empfangen und haben kurz vor Schließung noch einen Platz bekommen. Wir empfanden es als überteuert für eine Nacht 98$ für einen Platz mit Strom zu verlangen. Es gibt nur drei Duschen und WC’s bei den Damen. Es war sauber aber etwas veraltet. Die Campingküche war ok. Die Nähe zum Meer ist super, leider war es bei uns zu stürmisch und hat geregnet.

Extremely small sites. Had to park our car where the awning should be and it was still tight. Very very noisy with campers so close to vans playing loud music. Location is the only good thing about this park. Definitely would not recommend.
Excellent camp sites, walking distance to beach, not far from Apollo Main St, great facilities - will definitely return!

A star given for the lovely location - which was the reason we booked a site. Nothing else warrants a star. Understandably parks on the Great Ocean Road are in high demand over the Christmas holidays. However, peak fees of $154 per night for a caravan site for 2 adults makes you think facilities would be good. Our site was tiny with no space to park the car. Adjoining sites overlapped each other to get an awning up. Facilities were totally inadequate for the number of guests squeezed into this small caravan park, contributing to them quickly becoming filthy. And the minimum booking was 7 nights! We left early.
Nothing special. Basic camping ground. Facilities were clean though

Caravan sites too small. Unable to extend awning and car had to be partially parked on narrow road making it difficult for others to get their vans on their site.  We were lucky that the 2 sites opposite and the one next to us were empty and could park our van on our site.  When leaving,  had to ask 2 neighbours to move their cars. .....and it still took some manoeuvring to vacate site. Not enough toilets or showers for the amount of people staying over holiday period.  Can't knock the location though.
Good
Basic cabins but spectacular views and sweet visiting birdlife. Great dog-friendly option on the Great Ocean Road trip.
Great staff, beautiful views, good kitchen. Bathrooms could have an upgrade, at the cost.
A very clean, friendly, and pet tolerant caravan & camping park. The facilities are good. The views are  lovely. Lovely place to stay for a few days.

Location of this park is its best feature . On arrival we had no power pole , it was under construction with office closed we called AH number and they had to run our power to another spot . All the sites were very small and difficult to get vans in . Power failed the next morning so maintenance was called again . Amenities need updating badly , and that’s an understatement. They were also dirty . Camp kitchen tiny and toaster kept tripping electricity ! One of the 2 stoves was broken also . |All this for $67 per night !!|Dearest Park we stayed at during our 4 weeks holiday . Give it a BIG miss .

Amazing location on the ocean.
Good (not great sites, basic amenities and camp kitchen. Come for the view
Fantastic location
Nice place and nice position and nice people
Truly lovely Caravan Park and perfectly situated. Extremely clean but does get very busy at peak periods.
We booked a cabin with seaview and we were not disappointed. That was my view of sunrise the first day. Loved the proximity to beach and the fact that both park and beach were dog friendly.

Great location right on the beach. Staff were so lovely and helpful. The shower facilities are kept really nice and the hot showers were great. The kitchen facilities work perfectly and are also well kept.

The great team at Marengo Caravan Park went above & beyond to accommodate our family. Thanks so much again.
Great caravan park, dog friendly, beach at your doorstep, highly recommend 👍🏻
First time we stayed here with our dog.  Management were welcoming and friendly.  Lovely quiet spot and you could hear the waves crashing at night. Lovely clean cabin.

So good! We had an unpowered campsite and it was so close to the beach! The access was great, staff was friendly and the bathrooms + kitchen were very clean.
Would definetly recommend

Marengo Family Caravan Park is situated on the Great Ocean Walking Trail and has an absolute beach front overlooking Marengo Reef Marine Sanctuary that protects a Seal Colony and sensitive Marine Ecology. Pet Friendly with plenty of Cabins, Powered Caravan and Camping sites. Clean and well maintained with Modern Amenities. Helpful friendly Staff that run a "tight ship" for everyone's comfort. Give it ⚓⚓⚓
I have been in this place I left my caravan went to city nice staff
Loving listening to the surf rolling in
Great location, friendly staff and good clean facilities. Managed to see some seals from the camp so a great bonus.

The perfect spot to park your caravan for 3 or 4 days. The park is clean and very well kept. Location has access to the beach and rocks straight outside your door.

On day 1 we parked our caravan at Marengo and then drove back to Torquay and then saw all the sites along the beautiful great Ocean road.

Obviously going to Bells beach was a highlight of this stretch in the coast line, but also St George River, Carisbrooke falls and the Eagle rock marine sanctuary were awesome.

Whilst is Torquay we took the opportunity to eat out at the The Salty Dog Cafe https://g.co/kgs/ZSnLYm5, what a great spot to take your fur friend for a walk and a great meal.

Day two and three involved walking a sections of the great Ocean walk, which starts straight out of Marengo Caravan Park, such beautiful coast line.

The walking was intermixed with the awesome seafood from Apollo Bay Fishermen's Co-Op -
https://g.co/kgs/ry589Vs and a couple of quiet drinks at the Apollo Bay Hotel - https://g.co/kgs/UC8XzTq.

I highly recommend Marengo family caravan park as a great base to explore this wonderful part of Australia.

Stayed a couple of relaxing days and visited many local attractions.  Park has great views and access to walking trails. Not far to fish and chips or other shops.
Very hospitable staff.
Great campground.  Beautiful views of the beach with easy access.
Friendly staff. Good facilities, above all nice location and sceneries
Luxury pet cabin!!!!  Absolutely spotless and modern.  Good people had us sorted for a late arrival and a super helpful text on how to access the site. 10/10 on the tired travellers list.
Brilliant, super friendly staff, super helpful, great location and nice sites. Had a wonderful stay, thanks for having us!
Haben gerade so vor Feierabend einen Platz ergattert. Schön gelegen direkt am Meer. Sanitairanlage sehr sauber.

We stayed here on the weekend for a couple of nights.  The location is beautiful and the staff were so helpful and accommodating with a late check out because of a fishing charter. We will definately be back not just for the location but because the staff are lovely.  Watching the sun come up from the park over the beach was amazing and there are beautiful rock pools for small children as well as lovely beach spots. It's dog friendly too which is a bonus!

Great Caravan Park and is dog friendly.  Very busy with cabins, powered and uncovered sites for any type of camping.  Staff are great, very helpful and friendly.  Beach access and coastal walking trails

This 5 stars goes to the lovely Pip who helped my partner and I out this weekend. We booked last minute for one night, once we were there we asked if it was possible for 2. Pip gave us three different options and when we weren’t 100% onboard (bless her we were so tired) she looked up another site right near by and that was absolutely perfect. Thanks Pip! You’re a rockstar.
For the cost, be aware cabins are now looking well warn inside. They seem to be only superficially maintained, but the location is fantastic
Had an amazing experience of staying with family at Marengo park. We rented a RV amd used one of their powered sites.

We absolutely loved our holiday here. Family of 4 with 2 young kids, the cabin was clean & tidy with an amazing view of the ocean. We had king parrots and Rosella's visit us every morning.
The beach was so close which also had great little rock pools to explore.
The park Koalas really topped off our trip, amazing to see them in their natural habitat.
All the staff were so friendly and accommodating. The daily activities they were putting on for the kids helped so much to keep them entertained.
We will definitelybe back!
Awesome location & service. Unfortunately The Weather was very Windy with heavy rain

There is only 1 small toilet block for the whole park.

It's dirty and rundown. However the location is great and it's dog friendly
Lovely park. Well maintained. Easy access to apollo bay. Seals and koalas.
Overnight caravan stay.  Check the weather before going!
Stayed in a cabin.  Great location for Great Otway NP.  Just minutes from Apollo Bay.  Quiet, good bed.
Amazing experience and bonus pet friendly too!
Caravan sites some on grass or slabs ,lots of cabins, views of beach and surf,great

We stayed at MFC Park 4 nights, we were not disappointed at all everything was just fantastic. The location you could not fault views of the hills and ocean views fantastic , the beds are very comfortable, kitchen had everything you needed.
We highly recommend MFC Park to those who are visiting the area.
We will definitely return.... thank you to all staff

Stayed here for two nights. Cabins were great and had a nice view of the ocean. Beach surrounding the caravan park and you could even see seals out on a distant rock. The staff were super friendly. Would highly recommend this caravan park and would happily stay here again. By far my most favorite place we have stayed in on our holiday on the great ocean road.

Great location and site. We had a great stay apart from the electrical issues we had.
But that aside. We will be back.

Family of 5 and 2 dogs stayed in a cabin. Loved it. The park was 1 min walk, good community / BBQ facilities and the beach was 3 mins walk without crossing a road. Only 5 min drive to Apollo Bay shops. Great atmosphere for the long weekend.
Beach camping

Passing through as a couple with a tent, it was off-season. This place was fantastic. The young lady at the receptionist desk was beyond helpful and the facilities were all lovely, clean. Had a great shower. Code to get in so it feels very safe.

We actually had trouble getting into another campsite near by, were very stressed. Arrived here moments before closing and the young lady at the office was beyond helpful and kind despite the time.
The next evening we decided to sleep in the car instead of the tent after chatting to her about how bad the coming storm would get, and this bloody lady offered to help us take our tent down in the wind and rain so it was done faster.
Always with a smile. Unbelievable.

tl;dr You'll be looked after here. Offers like that are beyond the call of duty for a receptionist. 6/5 service.

This has got to be the place to stay on the Great Oean Road!
Views are incredible. Located near the town and the walking is fantastic.
Lovely position near the beach. A colony of seals live on the rocks a few hundred metres offshore.
A pet friendly  caravan park right on the Ocean  Cabins are comfortable  A great  place to get away
Very good cabins. Lovely staff and great I ocean view
Amazing view from our balcony Marie Gabrielle cabin, very clean and quiet

Had a recent cabin stay but were disappointed that the TV in our unit had no reception. Staff tried to rectify the issue but were unsuccessful. Apparently there are problems at this location with free to air TV, so we suggest you check the situation when making your booking.
What a delightful place to stay. Views from our balcony were pretty special looking out to the ocean.
Used a powered site, clean amenities, close to the water. Nice spot.
Great little park, great location, clean amenities and friendly staff. Very pet friendly. Would highly recommend
Always a comfy , cosy stay . Beautiful views and position in Apollo Bay.  Close to everything.  Great customer service and prices . Highly recommend 👌

A lovely caravan park right on a beach.

I was travelling solo by tent in early July. The park was pretty quite around this time. The kitchen and bathrooms were always spotless.

It is only a 30 minute walk into the center of Apollo Bay, 20 minutes can be on the beach, but there is a walking track the whole way. Just be mindful that there is limited street lighting, you may want to bring your torch.
I want to get  there  one day  fishing  and golfing ⛳️
beautiful service, beautiful view, great amenities. affordable and good for budget friendly campers, beautiful views of the ocean only metres from the campsite
This caravan park needs a lot of TLC!! Only 2 ladies toliets and both blocked very disappointing!!
After asking for a large caravan site we got a small one place needs TLC Urgently with only 2 ladies toliets both blocked very old place!
